core.db package¶

Submodules¶

core.db.db_manager module¶

class core.db.db_manager.DatabaseManager(db_url=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Handles all database operations for the Personal Planner application.

This includes management of tasks, habits, vacations, and itineraries. Provides CRUD operations and utility methods for database interactions.

add_activity(vacation_id, day, start_time, end_time, activity, location=None, notest=None)[source]¶

Adds an activity to a vacation itinerary.

Args:

vacation_id (int): Vacation ID. day (str | datetime.date): Day of the activity. start_time (str | datetime.time): Start time. end_time (str | datetime.time): End time. activity (str): Activity description. location (str, optional): Activity location. notest (str, optional): Notes for the activity.

add_habit(title, goal)[source]¶

Adds a new habit.

Args:

title (str): Habit title. goal (int): Weekly goal (1-7).

add_task(title, date)[source]¶

Adds a new task to the database.

Args:

title (str): Task title. date (str | datetime.date): Task date.

add_vacation(destination, start_date, end_date)[source]¶

Adds a new vacation to the database.

Args:

destination (str): Vacation destination. start_date (str | datetime.date): Start date. end_date (str | datetime.date): End date.

close()[source]¶

Closes the database connection.

delete_activity(activity_id)[source]¶

Deletes an activity from the itinerary.

delete_habit(habit_id)[source]¶

Marks a habit as inactive (soft delete).

delete_task(task_id)[source]¶

Deletes a task.

get_activities(vacation_id, day)[source]¶

Retrieves activities for a specific vacation day.

Args:

vacation_id (int): Vacation ID. day (str | datetime.date): Day to retrieve activities for.

Returns:

list[Itinerary]: List of Itinerary objects.

get_tasks_by_date(date)[source]¶

Retrieves tasks for a specific date.

Args:

date (str | datetime.date): Date for which to retrieve tasks.

Returns:

list[Task]: List of Task objects for the specified date.

get_vacations()[source]¶

Retrieves all vacations from the database.

Returns:

list[Vacation]: List of Vacation objects.

get_weekly_habits(week_start)[source]¶

Retrieves all habits and their completion logs for a week.

Args:

week_start (datetime.date): Start date of the week (Monday).

Returns:
list[dict]: List of habits with structure:
{

“id”: int, “title”: str, “weekly_goal”: int, “logs”: dict[str, bool]

}

initialize_database()[source]¶

Creates all required database tables if they do not exist.

Tables created:

  • tasks

  • habits

  • habit_logs

  • vacations

  • itineraries

mark_task_done(task_id)[source]¶

Marks a task as completed.

toggle_day(habit_id, day)[source]¶

Toggles a habit log for a specific day.

update_activity(activity_id, start_time, end_time, activity, location, notest)[source]¶

Updates an existing activity.

Personal Planner
